title: THE ORIGIN OF THE ENGLISH LANGUAGE AND STEPS OF SPREADING
author: Khaitova Alokhon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article talks about the various information on the history of the English Language including  its original language family with the earliest forms spoken by inhabitants as well as  spreading of modern English, and its geographical  distribution.
